title: Codonoboea amoena

The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Codonoboea amoena include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects.
